parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam class {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFE0
    BorderColor #A9D08E
    ArrowColor #004080
}
skinparam package {
    BorderColor black
    BorderThickness 2
}

package "OpenAI-Baseline" {
    class RLImplementation
}

package "OpenAI-Gym" {
    class Env
    note left of Env
        Generic interface between RL
        algorithms and simulation
        environments
    end note
}

package "atc-reinforcement-learning" {
    class AtcGym
    class Airspace
    class Runway
    class Airplane
    class MinimumVectoringAltitude
    class Corridor
    class SimParameters

    AtcGym *-left- Airspace
    AtcGym *-- "1\n\nmany" Airplane
    AtcGym *-right- SimParameters
    
    Airspace *-right- Runway
    Airspace *-- "1\n\nmany" MinimumVectoringAltitude
    
    Runway *-- Corridor
    
    Airplane --> SimParameters
}

RLImplementation --> Env
Env <|-- AtcGym

@enduml
```
